description:
Primary path to €50k target. Rolling submission via PTJ easy-Online.

**Draft ready:** meta/zim-projektskizze-draft.md
**Target:** €50,000 grant (60% of €83,333 project, 18 months)

**Steps:**
1. Review/finalize Projektskizze with Robin
2. Submit informal inquiry via PTJ after GmbH/UG exists
3. Do NOT start project expenses before Bewilligung

**Innovation angle:** Transparent will-model for human-AI cooperative agent systems.

status.comment: Projektskizze complete (meta/zim-projektskizze-draft.md); PTJ inquiry email drafted. Submit after incorporation.
